positive: A minimalist celestial pattern composition featuring stylized, interconnected constellations and crescent moons against a deep indigo gradient background. The style is neo-geometric and ethereal, utilizing thick, elegant linework and varying shades of luminous gold and deep midnight blue. The design must be highly centralized and symmetrical, with clean, distinct silhouettes that pop against the dark background, suitable for direct placement on apparel. Focus on crisp lines, high contrast, and a magical, cosmic feeling. Graphic design, symmetrical composition, ultra-detailed, print-ready.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, noise, gradient bleed, smudge, jpeg artifacts, messy background
